cards.basicText: Deal 999 damage to all opposing heroes.
cards.title: Serious Series: Serious Punch

cards.basicText: Deal 1 damage to all sidekicks in your zone, discard one card, and draw one card.
cards.title: Saitama's Disciple

cards.basicText: Genos recovers 2 health. Then, either discard a card from your opponent's hand, or draw 1 card.
cards.title: Kueseno's Technology

cards.afterText: Recover 2 health or discard 2 cards from the top of your deck.
cards.title: s-class hero

cards.immediateText: If the printed value of the opponent's card is 4, add 2 to this card's value.
cards.title: g4 upgrade

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, Genos may take 2 damage to discard 2 cards and draw 2 cards.
cards.title: core blast

cards.afterText: The opponent may chose to take 1 damage. If they do, they may swap up to 2 cards from Genos's hand with cards from his discard pile.
cards.title: Incinerate

cards.afterText: If Genos lost the combat, draw 2 cards.
cards.title: Arms mode

cards.afterText: Deal damage to the opponent equal to the boost value of their card.
cards.title: Search eye

cards.duringText: Genos may place cards from his discard pile onto is deck to increase this cards value by +1 per card.
cards.title: Virtual Genocide System

cards.duringText: If Genos is adjacent to the opponent, deal them no damage. Instead discard cards from the top of your deck equal to the damage they would have recieved.
cards.title: Rocket punch

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on the opponent's card, or reduce their card's value to 0
cards.title: heroes just for fun

hero.name: Genos
hero.specialAbility:
Genos may not BOOST, and may not draw any cards that place his hand above 7 cards.

If Genos is defeated, you lose the game.

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote:
“Even the most powerful weapon would be meaningless if its wielder is weak.” 
- Genos

hero.name: One Punch Man
hero.specialAbility: Saitama is late! Place him off of the board and his card out of the deck. When Genos's deck is empty, you may place Saitama on the board and his card in your hand.

sidekick.name: Genos
sidekick.quote: "I'll leave tomorrow's problems to tomorrow's me." - Saitama
